reviews.comment:
Las chicas Laura, Claudia y Fer fueron muy amables y me ayudaron a tener una promoción que no vi y me salió mas barata la comida.

Me salvaron el bolsillo! Son lo más ❤️

(Translated by Google)
Laura, Claudia, and Fer were so kind and helped me find a deal I hadn't seen before, which made my meal much cheaper.

They saved me money! They're the best ❤️
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2sxUk1UUjNZMDk0YkhSM2NUTjZTMFZGTTFCV1VHYxAB

reviews.comment:
Li do lugar para pasar un rato charlando con amigos, variedad de opciones de comida, lugar limpio con distancia entre las mesas, el personal muy servicial, baños limpios y cómodos, lugar amplia en la playa de estacionamiento

(Translated by Google)
Li is a great place to hang out and chat with friends, with a variety of food options, a clean place with social distancing between tables, very helpful staff, clean and comfortable restrooms, and ample parking.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tGZlJYWjNORk5xY2s1b0xVdE1NamMxV0d3eGRGRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy mala experiencia, el playero de la noche muy dudoso, me decía q no le dí la tarjeta y me trataba de mala manera, cómo vió q yo estaba muy seguro y baje a confrontarlo de repente apareció, la tiró al piso y dijo que se le había caído, para mí cómo era de mercado pago se quiso mandar alguna, tengan mucho cuidado.

(Translated by Google)
Very bad experience. The night attendant was very suspicious, telling me I hadn't given him the card and treating me badly. When he saw I was very sure and went down to confront him, he suddenly appeared, threw it on the ground and said he had dropped it. I think, since it was a Mercado Pago card, he was trying to pull a fast one. Be very careful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xCU1ZGaHdialUyYm5oV01YSXhjbTkyUW14R1JYYxAB

reviews.comment:
Única estación de (servicio) de tantas que entre a cargar combustible, la cual no te venden cigarrillos con mercado pago...
Solo efectivo...
Raro...

(Translated by Google)
The only gas station out of all the ones I've stopped at that doesn't accept Mercado Pago for cigarettes... Cash only... Weird...

reviews.comment:
BAÑOS destruidos, sin jabón, las puertas no cierran, falta higiene, hay mucho olor. Pagamos la cuota y últimamente los baños dan vergüenza.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are in ruins, there's no soap, the doors don't close, they're unhygienic, and they smell terrible. We pay our fees, and lately the bathrooms have become a disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21remVWQnZVSGR6UTBGeVVuQktiMFpPUW0wemJGRRAB

reviews.comment:
Vamos todas las mañanas a desayunar y la verdad que la atención es excelente. Por eso volvemos siempre! Unas genias todas las que tienden.

(Translated by Google)
We go there every morning for breakfast and the service is truly excellent. That's why we always come back! The staff are all wonderful.
